name: PROLAPSED ANTRAL MUCOSA
definition: prolapse of hypertrophic + inflammatory mucosa of gastric antrum into duodenum resulting in
dominant_finding: mushroom- / umbrella- / cauliflower-shaped filling defect at duodenal base
discriminating_features: mushroom- / umbrella- / cauliflower-shaped filling defect at duodenal base
filling defect varies in size + shape
redundant gastric rugae can be traced from pyloric antrum through pyloric channel

general: mushroom- / umbrella- / cauliflower-shaped filling defect at duodenal base
filling defect varies in size + shape
redundant gastric rugae can be traced from pyloric antrum through pyloric channel
